channel.title: Yoast SEO package conflict issue with "Frontity (frontity-chakra-theme)"
channel.description:
Hello Everyone, I'm using frontity-chakra-theme for my project, I have integrated contact form 7, WP-comments package seamlessly. But, after integrating the Frontity Yoast SEO package the web app is not working. The yoast tags are not appearing and also the post details page is not working.
Please Note : I have the latest Yoast SEO plugin installed in my WordPress installation and Yoast head tags are appearing in JSON file. I have checked via POSTMAN. Please suggest any sollution.
Any sort of help will be highly appreciated. Thanks in the advance.

item.title: Yoast SEO package conflict issue with "Frontity (frontity-chakra-theme)"
item.dc:creator: rebruce.blog
item.description:
I’m also facing this issue

Read full topic
item.source: Yoast SEO package conflict issue with "Frontity (frontity-chakra-theme)"

item.title: Yoast SEO package conflict issue with "Frontity (frontity-chakra-theme)"
item.dc:creator: bc.ayrton
item.description:
Hello, did you manage to solve the problem?

Read full topic
item.source: Yoast SEO package conflict issue with "Frontity (frontity-chakra-theme)"

item.title: Yoast SEO package conflict issue with "Frontity (frontity-chakra-theme)"
item.dc:creator: andolasoft.user109
item.description:
Hello Everyone,
I’m using frontity-chakra-theme for my project, I have integrated contact form 7, WP-comments package seamlessly. But, after integrating the Frontity Yoast SEO package the web app is not working. The yoast tags are not appearing and also the post details page is not working.

Please Note : I have the latest Yoast SEO plugin installed in my WordPress installation and Yoast head tags are appearing in JSON file. I have checked via POSTMAN. Please suggest any sollution.

Any sort of help will be highly appreciated. Thanks in the advance.
